exec wpry dir

cmp stdout out.golden
! stderr .

-- dir/style.css --
/*
Theme Name: Full Theme
Theme URI: https://example.com/full-theme
Description: A fully specified theme.
Version: 3.0.0
Requires at least: 6.0
Requires PHP: 8.0
Author: Full Author
Author URI: https://example.com/author
License: GPL-2.0-or-later
License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html
Text Domain: full-theme
Domain Path: /lang
Tested up to: 6.5
Tags: custom-background, custom-logo
Template: twentytwentyfive
*/

-- dir/another.css --
/*
Theme Name: Another Theme
*/

-- dir/readme.txt --
I am readme.txt

-- dir/index.php --
<?php
// Silence is golden.

-- out.golden --
{"path":"style.css","theme":{"name":"Full Theme","uri":"https://example.com/full-theme","author":"Full Author","author_uri":"https://example.com/author","description":"A fully specified theme.","version":"3.0.0","requires_wp":"6.0","tested_up_to":"6.5","requires_php":"8.0","license":"GPL-2.0-or-later","license_uri":"https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html","text_domain":"full-theme","domain_path":"/lang","tags":"custom-background, custom-logo","template":"twentytwentyfive"}}
